asset.title: Two Client Fresh Room
asset.purpose: README live walkthrough clip. Judge whether the feature is obvious, visually consistent, and credible as evidence.

judge.summary: A clear, step-by-step demonstration of two clients in a shared room where an AI agent reconciles a spreadsheet live, updating both views simultaneously.

featureClarity.evidence: The walkthrough clearly shows Client A asking the agent to reconcile, and the resulting live updates on both screens.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Captures the initial empty state, the user prompt, the agent processing, and the final synchronized state.

visualDesign.evidence: The side-by-side layout is clean, though the dark theme and small text make it slightly dense.

consistency.evidence: Aligns perfectly with NodeRoom's core concepts of shared rooms, sheets, and collaborative agents.

evidenceQuality.evidence: High-fidelity UI recording showing real-time synchronization and agent execution.

legibility.evidence: Text is legible but small due to the dual-window layout on a single canvas.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for demonstrating real-time collaborative AI workflows in finance.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately depicts the latency and step-by-step progression of the agent's action.

defects.observed: The text in the chat input and spreadsheet cells is quite small when viewed at standard README scale.
defects.fix: Consider cropping closer to the active areas or increasing the default font size for the demo recording.

judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Watch NodeRoom reconcile a Q3 variance sheet live across multiple connected clients simultaneously.
